_publications._publicationTitle: Dopamine deficiency underlies learning deficits in neurofibromatosis-1 mice.

_contextSnippet: CKO mice exhibit reduced cAMP ( Fig. 3A ) and increased Ras/ERK activity ( Fig. 3B ) relative to littermate controls
details: Reduced cAMP levels and increased Ras/ERK activity in hippocampal tissue relative to littermate controls
